form.formComment: Returns from a 58-day let-up. Last start second last of 10 at Pakenham Bm62 on February 12 over 2500m, 13 len behind Nicoffhome carrying 62kg at $26. The race before that 7th of 11 at Sandown-Hillside Bm70 on February 4 over 3000m, 13 len behind Urban Outlook with 58.5kg at $13. Worth forgiving and can turn things around.

form.formComment: Form hard to fault. At the latest run favourite; ran on from midfield and won by 0.6 len at York April 6 over 1920m defeating Gold Beau carrying 56kg at $3.50. Before that 4th of 12 at Ascot Cl3 on March 11 over 1800m, 1.4 len behind Cheyne Bay with 52kg at $26. Hard to beat again in this sort of form.
